prediction.reasoning: Based on JNJ's historical volatility of approximately 15-20% annually and its large-cap pharmaceutical stock characteristics, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model. JNJ typically exhibits lower volatility than market average due to its defensive healthcare sector positioning and dividend aristocrat status. The 22-day forecast assumes continued stable fundamentals with normal market fluctuations. Point estimate reflects slight positive drift typical of established dividend-paying stocks.
